reasoning: The control CP-2 (8) focuses on identifying and protecting critical assets. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to identifying critical workloads and ensuring their protection through various security measures. RBAC can be used to control access to critical assets, etcd backups ensure data resilience, NetworkPolicies protect network access to critical assets, and labeling pods can help in identifying and managing critical workloads.
title: Contingency Plan | Identify Critical Assets
